title: senecio icoglossoides
intro: Senecio icoglossoides, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Senecio icoglossoides include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Senecio icoglossoides is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
